title: Mobile App: Expandable Long Text Field for Better Visibility

posts.author: jesse.mack (Jesse Mack)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’ve been using the Monday.com mobile app to fill out forms, and I really like the long text field for capturing detailed notes. However, I’ve noticed that when I type more than 3-4 lines of text, there’s no way to expand the field to see all my text at once. This makes it difficult to review and edit longer entries.

Would it be possible for Monday.com to add a feature that allows users to expand long text fields on mobile, similar to how they work on desktop? Here are some ideas that could help:

  • Auto-expanding text fields as more lines are added.
  • A “fullscreen” mode that lets users open the long text field in a larger view.
  • Drag-to-resize functionality like in some other mobile apps.

I’d love to hear if others have experienced this issue and if there are any workarounds. Also, if this is something that could be added to the roadmap, that would be fantastic!

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum
